subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou Who hearest the plaintive cries of them that are nigh unto Thee by reason of what hath befallen Thy loved ones and chosen ones, and beholdest what hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من تسمع حنین المقربین بما ورد علی اولیائک و اصفیائک و تری ما ورد
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @stories; anecdotes, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
